languages.text: {n}Манипулус лукаво улыбается.{/n} "{name}, позвольте раскрыть вам тайну. Не каждый факт, что провозглашается неопровержимым, является таковым на самом деле. Давайте проверим ваше утверждение на прочность вместе, как подобает коллегам".

{n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус лукаво улыбается.{/n} "{name}, позвольте раскрыть вам тайну. Не каждый факт, что провозглашается неопровержимым, является таковым на самом деле. Давайте проверим ваше утверждение на прочность вместе, как подобает коллегам".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

{n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

{n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus sonríe, travieso.{/n} «{name}, le contaré un secreto. Declarar que un hecho es irrefutable no hace que lo sea. Como colegas que somos, nos corresponde poner a prueba la veracidad de esa declaración».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus sonríe, travieso.{/n} «{name}, le contaré un secreto. Declarar que un hecho es irrefutable no hace que lo sea. Como colegas que somos, nos corresponde poner a prueba la veracidad de esa declaración».

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスはいたずらっぽく微笑む。{/n}「{name}、一つ秘密を教えましょう。議論の余地がないと宣言された事実のすべてが、実際にそうであるとはかぎりません。二人の同僚にふさわしく、あなたのその主張の頑健さを、共に検証してみようではありませんか」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスはいたずらっぽく微笑む。{/n}「{name}、一つ秘密を教えましょう。議論の余地がないと宣言された事実のすべてが、実際にそうであるとはかぎりません。二人の同僚にふさわしく、あなたのその主張の頑健さを、共に検証してみようではありませんか」

languages.text: {n}操纵者露出了诡黠的笑容。{/n}“{name}，让我告诉您一个秘密。并非所有被宣称为毋庸置疑的说法，就真的毫无争议。就让我们像两个同僚一样，一起检验一下您的论断有多牢靠吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者露出了诡黠的笑容。{/n}“{name}，让我告诉您一个秘密。并非所有被宣称为毋庸置疑的说法，就真的毫无争议。就让我们像两个同僚一样，一起检验一下您的论断有多牢靠吧。”

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus lächelt verschlagen.{/n} "{name}, lasst mich Euch ein Geheimnis verraten. Nicht jede Tatsache ist tatsächlich unumstößlich. Lasst uns Eurer Behauptung gemeinsam überprüfen wie es unter Kollegen üblich ist."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus lächelt verschlagen.{/n} "{name}, lasst mich Euch ein Geheimnis verraten. Nicht jede Tatsache ist tatsächlich unumstößlich. Lasst uns Eurer Behauptung gemeinsam überprüfen wie es unter Kollegen üblich ist."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus sourit avec malice.{/n} « {name}, laissez-moi vous révéler un secret. Les faits indéniables ne le sont pas tous réellement. Mettons ensemble votre théorie à l'épreuve, comme il se doit entre collègues. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus sourit avec malice.{/n} « {name}, laissez-moi vous révéler un secret. Les faits indéniables ne le sont pas tous réellement. Mettons ensemble votre théorie à l'épreuve, comme il se doit entre collègues. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus yaramazca gülümsüyor.{/n} "Size bir sır vereyim. Yadsınamaz olduğu ilan edilen her gerçek, aslında öyle değildir. İddianızın sağlamlığını iki meslektaşa yakışır şekilde birlikte test edelim."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus smiles mischievously.{/n} "{name}, let me tell you a secret. Not every fact declared to be incontrovertible is actually so. Let us test the robustness of your claim together, as befits two colleagues."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus yaramazca gülümsüyor.{/n} "Size bir sır vereyim. Yadsınamaz olduğu ilan edilen her gerçek, aslında öyle değildir. İddianızın sağlamlığını iki meslektaşa yakışır şekilde birlikte test edelim."
